title: Onboarding - Translations
scenario: Verify that all text in the Onboarding flow is properly translated and displayed for each supported language.
steps: Start the app with a supported language.
Go through the entire Onboarding flow.
Check that all text is properly translated and displayed.
Repeat steps 1-3 for all supported languages.
expected: All text in the Onboarding flow is properly translated and displayed for each supported language.
